Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Continued To Oct-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello for Felicitas Garza (Personal Representative).

Ms. Robello stated that the main asset is an interest in the Father's estate in Texas, that she received the order from the Father's estate and that she will incorporate it in the final petition. Status on close of estate is continued to October 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Continued To Sep-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Button for Felicitas Garza (Administrator).

Ms. Button stated that they just got the information, that the Decedent's Father's estate in Texas is going to close and has a hearing date of August 26th and that she will be filing a petition for approval of a status report soon. Status on close of estate is continued to September 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court is expecting Ms. Button to have her petition on file one week before the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-22-2019 Continued To Aug-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Continued To Aug-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Lachona for Felicitas Garza.

Mr. Lachona stated that he received an e mail from Counsel over the weekend stating that he and his Client will not be appearing to argue, but he will not withdraw their petition. The Court granted Mr. Lachona's Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $16,000.00 is required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for July 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for July 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
